violations.summary: Congress enacts a statute requiring state executive officials to implement and enforce a federal regulatory program, in violation of the anti-commandeering provision of Article X Section 1.2.

bottlenecks.summary: Federal courts failed to void the federal commandeering statute by day 15 under Article X Section 1.2.
